zh.Gerrardstown, County Meath, Ireland: 愛爾蘭庫迪 米亞斯格勒亞德斯托

zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Cusack於1271年出生在愛爾蘭庫迪 米亞斯格勒亞德斯托時，他的父親Andrew de Cusack Lord of Gerrardstown23歲，母親Maud Pilate24歲。他於1294年與Margaret FitzGerald在愛爾蘭庫迪 米亞斯格勒亞德斯托結婚。他們至少是12個兒子的父母。他去世於1346年2月4日之後在愛爾蘭庫迪 米亞斯格勒亞德斯托。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John Cusack于1271年出生在爱尔兰庫迪 米亞斯格勒亞德斯托时，他的父亲Andrew de Cusack Lord of Gerrardstown23岁，母亲Maud Pilate24岁。他于1294年与Margaret FitzGerald在爱尔兰庫迪 米亞斯格勒亞德斯托结婚。他们至少是12个儿子的父母。他去世于1346年2月4日之后在爱尔兰庫迪 米亞斯格勒亞德斯托。

nameMeanings.name: Cusack
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Aileen, Brigid, Eamon, Fergus, Seamus.

Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Cussac in Guienne, France, named with the Gallo-Roman personal name Cūcius or Cussius + the locative suffix -acum. The surname died out in England, but is common in Ireland, where it was imported at the time of the Anglo-Norman invasion in the 12th century. It has been Gaelicized as de Cíosóg.

variants.name: Cuzick
meanings: Irish and English (Worcestershire): variant of   Cusack  . This form of the surname is no longer found in Ireland and is rare in Britain.

variants.name: Cusick
meanings: Irish and Scottish: variant of   Cusack  , now found predominantly in Scotland.
Americanized form of Polish Kusik or Czech Kusík, Slovak Kúšik and Kušík.
Americanized form of Croatian Kusić, Croatian and Serbian Kušić (see Kusic ), or Serbian Ćušić (see Cusic ).

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Cusack was born in 1271, in Gerrardstown, County Meath, Ireland, his father, Andrew de Cusack Lord of Gerrardstown, was 23 and his mother, Maud Pilate, was 24. He married Margaret FitzGerald in 1294, in Gerrardstown, County Meath, Ireland. They were the parents of at least 12 sons. He died after 4 February 1346, in Gerrardstown, County Meath, Ireland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Cusack est né en 1271, à Gerrardstown, County Meath, Irlande, son père, Andrew de Cusack Lord of Gerrardstown, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Maud Pilate, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Margaret FitzGerald en 1294, à Gerrardstown, County Meath, Irlande. Ils ont eu au moins 12 fils. Il est décédé après 4 février 1346, à Gerrardstown, County Meath, Irlande.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John Cusack 1271 in Gerrardstown, County Meath, Irland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Andrew de Cusack Lord of Gerrardstown 23 und seine Mutter Maud Pilate 24. Er hat 1294 in Gerrardstown, County Meath, Irland Margaret FitzGerald geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 12 Söhne. Er starb nach 4. Februar 1346 in Gerrardstown, County Meath, Irland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Cusack è nato il nel 1271 nel Gerrardstown, County Meath, Irlanda, il suo padre, Andrew de Cusack Lord of Gerrardstown, aveva 23 anni e il suo madre, Maud Pilate, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Margaret FitzGerald nel 1294, nel Gerrardstown, County Meath, Irlanda. Erano genitori di almeno 12 figli. Morì dopo il 4 febbraio 1346, nel Gerrardstown, County Meath, Irlanda.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Cusackが1271年にアイルランドコウントイ メアスジャーラルドストウンで生まれた時，父Andrew de Cusack Lord of Gerrardstownは23歳，母Maud Pilateは24歳であった。1294年にアイルランドコウントイ メアスジャーラルドストウンでMargaret FitzGeraldと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも12人の息子の親であった。彼は1346年2月4日以後にアイルランドコウントイ メアスジャーラルドストウンで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Cusack(이)가 1271년 아일랜드 카운티 미스 그라르드스타운에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Andrew de Cusack Lord of Gerrardstown(은)는 23세였고, 그의 어머니 Maud Pilate(은)는 24세였다. 그는 1294년 아일랜드 카운티 미스 그라르드스타운에서 Margaret FitzGerald(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 열 명 이상의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1346년 2월 4일 이후 아일랜드 카운티 미스 그라르드스타운에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Cusack nasceu em 1271, em Gerrardstown, County Meath, Irlanda, seu pai, Andrew de Cusack Lord of Gerrardstown, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Maud Pilate, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret FitzGerald em 1294, em Gerrardstown, County Meath, Irlanda. Eles tiveram pelo menos 12 filhos. Ele faleceu após 4 de fevereiro de 1346, em Gerrardstown, County Meath, Irlanda.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Cusack родился в 1271 г. в местности джиррардстоун, коунти мит, Ирландия, его отцу по имени Andrew de Cusack Lord of Gerrardstown было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Maud Pilate, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret FitzGerald в 1294 г. в местности джиррардстоун, коунти мит, Ирландия. У них было по крайней мере 12 сыновей. Он умер после 4 февраль 1346 г. в местности джиррардстоун, коунти мит, Ирландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir John Cusack nació en 1271, en Gerrardstown, County Meath, Irlanda, su papá, Andrew de Cusack Lord of Gerrardstown, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Maud Pilate, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Margaret FitzGerald en 1294, en Gerrardstown, County Meath, Irlanda. Fueron padres de por lo menos 12 hijos. Murió después de 4 de febrero de 1346, en Gerrardstown, County Meath, Irlanda.
